# Security Checklist: Enter Street Address to Estimate Property Value

**Purpose**: Validate security-related requirements clarity, completeness, and coverage.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/001-uc01-feature-spec/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are requirements defined for protecting address inputs as potentially sensitive data? [Gap] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.
- [ ] CHK002 Are requirements defined for limiting abusive geocoding requests (rate limits or throttling)? [Gap] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.
- [ ] CHK003 Are requirements defined for logging and redaction of address data in error paths? [Gap] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK004 If any authentication/authorization is required for the API, is it explicitly specified? [Gap] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.
- [x] CHK005 Are retry limits and failure handling defined precisely to prevent unlimited external calls? [Clarity, Spec §Clarifications]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK006 Do the functional requirements and exception flows consistently state that no estimate is displayed on geocoding failure? [Consistency, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK007 Are requirements defined for handling malformed or excessively long address inputs? [Gap] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.
- [x] CHK008 Are requirements defined for dependency outages (geocoding unavailable) including user messaging and recovery steps? [Coverage, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK009 Are security requirements specified for external service communication (e.g., HTTPS, timeouts)? [Gap] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.
